mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE months AS ( SELECT #{startYear} AS y, #{startMonth} AS m, 0 AS idx UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN m = 12 THEN y + 1 ELSE y END AS y, CASE WHEN m = 12 THEN 1 ELSE m + 1 END AS m, idx + 1 AS idx FROM months WHERE idx + 1 < #{months} ) SELECT CONCAT(LPAD(y, 4, '0'), '-', LPAD(m, 2, '0')) AS ym, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(s.monthly_amount) FROM financial_node_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND s.year = months.y AND s.month = months.m AND s.type = 'INCOME' ), 0) AS income, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(s.monthly_amount) FROM financial_node_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND s.year = months.y AND s.month = months.m AND s.type = 'EXPENSE' ), 0) AS expense, ( COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(s.monthly_amount) FROM financial_node_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND s.year = months.y AND s.month = months.m AND s.type = 'INCOME' ), 0) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(s.monthly_amount) FROM financial_node_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND s.year = months.y AND s.month = months.m AND s.type = 'EXPENSE' ), 0) ) AS net FROM months ORDER BY months.y, months.m;
